item.title: Hello, World!
item.description: This is the first post of my new blog. It's mostly for testing and style tweaking, so it's fairly sparse.

item.title: Introducing: chalk-blog
item.description: For the past few months I've started having ideas for blog articles I wanted to write. Not having an actual blog made that somewhat difficult, so naturally, that led into how I could develop my own blogging system...

item.title: Making Node CLI Apps: The Basics
item.description: Node is actually a pretty good choice when you want to make a command line application. On my journey to create chalk-blog, I had to research some of these basics and figured I would consolidate them into a single blog for posterity.
